## Summary
- What changed?
- Why now?

## Linked issue
- Required: `Closes #<issue>`
- Closes #

## Scope
- [ ] repo/workflow
- [ ] frontend
- [ ] backend
- [ ] governance/product docs
- [ ] infra/deploy

## Validation
- Commands/checks run:
- Evidence:

## Pre-merge follow-through
- Required local checks run:
- CI status / link to latest green run:
- Conflict remediation performed (or `none required`):
- Remaining blocker outside agent control (or `none`):

## Post-merge reconciliation plan
- Linked issue close path:
- Follow-up issue(s) / deferred work:
- Branch cleanup / final reconciliation notes:

## Risk + rollback
- Risk impact:
- Rollback plan:

## Checklist
- [ ] Issue-first flow followed
- [ ] Branch from fork used
- [ ] No direct push to protected default branch
- [ ] Local validation run and evidence updated in PR body
- [ ] CI failures will be remediated on this PR unless proven external
- [ ] Merge conflicts/stale branch state will be remediated on this PR before handoff
- [ ] Post-merge reconciliation plan captured above (or explicitly `n/a`)
- [ ] Roadmap mapping updated (or excluded rationale added) when issues open/close/re-scope
